name: N7UniformSecp256k1X
why_it_matters: The uniform multiplication-by-n x-coordinate formula x(n*P) = Phi_n(x)/PsiSq_n(x) on the actual secp256k1 point group, for all n at once - the monolithic missing rung (node S3/N7, BARRIERS.md B3). Fixed n=2,3,4,5 are proved as per-n certificates; this is the general induction, absent from Mathlib (no Point<->Psi/Phi connection, no omega y-coordinate division polynomial). Substrate landed: coordinate-ring translation phi_n*PsiSq_n=Phi_n*psi_n^2 (S1) and doubling divisibility psi_n | psi_2n (S2, the omega prerequisite).

default_budget.note: Not a tier-0 target. Multi-cycle focused grind per the proof DAG; the fast-feedback server bridge speeds verification, not authoring.

hint: Proof DAG (attack order): (S2') define omega_n via psi_2n/psi_n = complEDS2... (S2 landed), dividing by 2 which is a unit in F_p; (S3a) y(n*P) = omega_n(P)/psi_n(P)^3 on Points; (S3b) the induction x((n+1)P) = addX(x(nP), x, slope(x(nP), x, y(nP), y)) with x(nP)=Phi_n/PsiSq_n and the omega-based y(nP) substituted, closing via the division-polynomial addition recurrences (prePsi_even/odd, PsiSq_even/odd, Phi_ofNat) and the S1 coordinate-ring translation. Denominator nonzero because n*P affine => psi_n(P) != 0 => PsiSq_n(x) = psi_n(P)^2 != 0 on the curve (eval bridge eval_PsiSq_eq_normEDS_sq + torsion bridge). Each arrow is a self-contained obligation.

source.from: manual (S1/S2 substrate landed, PR #200/#201; wall mapped BARRIERS.md B3)
